|---|---|---|

4. **Authority disclosure threshold.** The policy requires legal compulsion (law or court order) — voluntary, discretionary disclosure to authorities is not contemplated.

GitHub's sharing is **purpose-limited and enumerated**; no residual or general discretionary sharing is authorized. Any sharing outside these five categories would be a policy violation.
